description: Identical: control and variant are the same content. Expect |delta| ≤ 0.05.

headingOutline.text: The web framework for content-driven websites

brief.icp: Web developers building content-heavy sites (blogs, docs, marketing) who want fast page loads and flexible framework integrations
brief.problemStatement: JS-heavy frameworks ship too much JavaScript for content sites, hurting performance and SEO.
brief.valueProp: Ship less JavaScript by default. Use any UI framework — React, Vue, Svelte — or none.

input.goal: increase npm installs from content-site developers

slots.headline: The web framework for content-driven websites

slots.subhead: Astro powers the world's fastest marketing sites, blogs, e-commerce websites, and more.
